suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: Validation artifacts (.factory/validation/) should be committed separately from feature code commits when possible, to keep feature commit history focused on application changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both pseudo-order-and-listing-model (6345accb) and fix-admin-exposure-for-pseudo-transactions (926b06e6) included .factory/validation/ JSON files alongside application code changes in the same commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce in marketplace-worker completion guidance that features adding admin-facing routes must include agent-browser validation with explicit interactiveChecks evidence in the handoff. The fix worker (fix-admin-exposure-for-pseudo-transactions) correctly followed this procedure, confirming the guidance is already in the skill but was missed by the original worker.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature pseudo-order-and-listing-model added admin owned-assets and admin listings surfaces but its handoff recorded only commandsRun and no interactiveChecks. The fix worker correctly included 7 agent-browser interactive verification steps.

rejectedObservations.observation: The fix worker correctly followed the marketplace-worker skill procedure including agent-browser interactive verification (step 5), which the original feature worker had skipped.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is informational confirmation that the fix worker did the right thing, not a new observation requiring action. Already covered by the suggested skill reinforcement above.
